Summary: Project governance and scope baseline
Description: As a project sponsor, I want scope, governance, success criteria, and delivery cadence defined so the implementation is controlled from day one.

Summary: Run project kickoff with business and IT stakeholders
Define in-scope and out-of-scope modules for phase 1
Define project objectives, KPIs, and success measures
Build stakeholder register and RACI
Define sprint cadence, status reporting, and governance meetings
Create RAID log and change control process
Current-state CRM and process assessment
Description: As a solution team, we need to understand the current CRM, sales process, and pain points so the new system solves the right problems.

Summary: Inventory current tables, forms, views, dashboards, flows, plugins, and JavaScript
Document current inside sales and outside sales processes
Document current lead, opportunity, case, and contact management process
Capture current reporting and manual workarounds
Identify duplicate data pain points and usability issues
Document legacy customizations that should not be carried forward
Data source and integration assessment
Description: As an integration architect, I want all current source systems and interfaces documented so the new CRM integration model is complete.

Summary: Identify all source systems feeding the current CRM
Document current Boomi integrations and data flows
Inventory Data Warehouse source objects and refresh frequency
Inventory Dotdigital touchpoints and synchronized data
Inventory Finance and Operations invoice data needed in CRM
Document inbound, outbound, and reporting dependencies

Summary: Identify KPIs for reps, territory managers, directors, and executives
Define required sales dashboards and operational reports

Capture invoice visibility and customer financial summary needs

Identify reports that can be retired

Define archive-only data
Define document and attachment migration scope
Define data retention and legal or compliance constraints
Produce migration scope sign-off

Define non-functional requirements for performance, auditability, and supportability
